overview.description: The PGIM AAA CLO ETF (PAAA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that holds USD-denominated collateralized loan obligations with AAA credit rating. Securities are selected using both top-down analysis and bottom-up research. PAAA was launched on Jul 19, 2023 and is issued by PGIM.

data.title: AAA-Rated CLOs: Safety and Yield in Today's Market
data.text: Matt Collins discusses why volatile markets are driving investors to search for safety and steady returns. He makes the case for AAA-rated CLOs, collateralized loan obligations, which have learned fro...
